name: Bone Beans
recipeInstructions:
1 pound pinto beans -- dried, salted to taste
pepper -- to taste
2 freezer containers, quart size
Rinse and sort the pinto beans. Place them in a large bowl and add water until the beans are covered 3 inches deep. Soak overnight.
The next morning, place the ham bone and soaked, drained beans in a crock pot; add water to cover.
Cook on High for 6 to 8 hours, until the beans are tender and the meat has separated from the bone.
Carefully remove the ham bones and fat, returning any slivers of meat to the beans. Season to taste.
To freeze: place the bone beans in freezer containers. Freeze.
To prepare: thaw the beans completely before heating. Heat in a saucepan over medium heat until hot. Serve with cornbread and green salad!
